MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 8, 2025, in Department 304, Line 3.

Appearances: Andrew Chew, ESQ., of Brayton Purcell.

Counsel Chew informs the court dismissal as to Frank Russo III was filed on May 21, 2025. Only matter for the court to determine is re: Plainitff Susanne Sloss. Upon conclusion of oral argument the court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SUSANNE SLOSS, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR OF FRANK RUSSO II, DECEASED MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS GRANTED, ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. ORDER WILL NOT BE VALID UNTIL ORDER IS SERVED ON SUSANNE SLOSS. THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER CONTINUED TO ITS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: DISMISSAL CALENDAR OF AUGUST 7, 2025, AT 9:00AM, IN DEPARTMENT 304. COUNSEL CHEW TO NOTICE SUSANNE SLOSS OF SAID HEARING, AND TO THE FACT THAT IF SHE DOES NOT APPEAR THE COURT IS INCLINED TO DISMISS THE MATTER. THE COURT WILL ALLOW SUSANNE SLOSS TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM. (EPS/304).
